creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

As the Droid fonts being updated on Mar 24, 2011 [1], I suggest to update
PORTVERSION to 20110324. Do you agree with change? Thanks.

[1] http://android.git.kernel.org/?p=platform/frameworks/base.git;a=commitdiff;h=6a19759c0fae744e80c032ca3c23932e73e6d9d9

Regards,
sunpoet
